title: Membership of State Banking Institutions in the Federal Reserve System; Recordkeeping and Confirmation of Certain Securities Transactions Effected by State Member Banks
abstract: The Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System is adopting final amendments to Regulation H pertaining to the recordkeeping and confirmation of certain securities transactions. The amendments accommodate developments in recordkeeping, confirmation and settlement requirements for broker-dealers by adding certain yield- related confirmation disclosure requirements for transactions involving debt and asset-backed securities effected by State member banks for customers, and providing for three
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
